task_title: CachedProvider range-aware lookup (serve subset from disk, skip network)

priya_plan.plan_summary: Add range-aware superset lookup to CachedProvider.FetchCandles. Before hitting the network, scan the instrument's cache directory for any file whose filename-encoded date range is a superset of [from, to]. If found, deserialize that file, filter the candle slice to the requested window, and return — zero network calls.
priya_plan.approach: Extend FetchCandles with findSupersetFile helper scanning instrument cache dir by filename parsing, filter candle slice to requested window on hit, zero network calls; existing miss path unchanged.

build.build_notes: Added range-aware superset lookup. New helpers: sanitizeInstrument, instrDir, findSupersetFile, filterCandles. Six new tests written TDD-first. All 13 tests pass with race detector.
